title: chore: update app metrics 2026-05-16
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Watering the Greenhouse
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just did its daily rounds, checking on the health and metrics of all the community apps in our greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse status in the repository.
gist.impact: Ensures the app showcase and greenhouse documentation reflect the latest health and usage statistics.
gist.visual_concept: A robot watering plants in a greenhouse, representing the automated bot updating app health metrics. Polly the bee is helping by checking a clipboard.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard.
